M1100_PTNT_LVG_STUTN M1100 Patient Living Situation This field indicates the best description of the patient's residential circumstance and availability of assistance. 01 = Patient lives alone, around the clock assistance available.
02 = Patient lives alone, regular daytime assistance available.
03 = Patient lives alone, regular nighttime assistance available.
04 = Patient lives alone, occasional / short-term assistance available.
05 = Patient lives alone, no
